_comment: autoDev headless permissions for {{CLIENT_NAME}}. Pre-grants exactly what the loop needs so devloop passes run without prompts (no blanket --dangerously-skip-permissions). The bot pushes feature/story branches only; only humans merge to {{DEFAULT_BRANCH}} (branch protection enforces this independently). The SessionStart hook re-orients EVERY session so autoDev drives instead of ad-hoc Claude Code — requires accepting the one-time workspace-trust prompt for hooks to run.

permissions._deny_note: The team's AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md are READ-ONLY to the engine (autodev.md non-negotiable 10). autoDev lives in .claude/autodev.md + .claude/skills/* + .autodev/. A convention change is proposed via a separate PR with rationale, never edited in place.
